# Minnesota Bankruptcy - Chapter 7 & 13 Filing Guide [2026]
> Last updated: 2026-05-01

> Free Minnesota bankruptcy guide for 2026. Compare Chapter 7 vs Chapter 13, Minnesota exemptions, filing costs, means test, and what to expe...

## About
minnesotabankruptcy.org is part of the Open Bankruptcy Project (openbankruptcyproject.org), a 501(c)(3) nonprofit building free, open-source tools for bankruptcy court transparency.
